violations.text: The grout in various locations of the kitchen was observed in poor repair. Pooling water/liquid was observed in the worn down grout. Grout to be redone/repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was less than 150 parts per million (ppm). The ppm must be in the range according to the manufacturer's use directions. 3-bay to be manually filled on dispensing adequately. 3-bay was emptied and filled with new sanitizer from dispenser and still not dispensing adequately. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026
The grout in various locations of the kitchen was observed in poor repair. Pooling water/liquid was observed in the worn down grout. Grout to be redone/repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-400 ppm. PIC flushed and cleaned out hose. Sanitizer was dispensing at adequate ppm. Employees to test 3-bay sink daily to ensure it is dispensing at adequate ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety registered with RIDOH. Application printed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the walk-in have an accumulation of dust, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024
An accumulation of dust and other debris was observed on the ceiling in the chicken walk-in. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024
Multiple tiles in the kitchen area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024
